GOOGLE TRANSLATE

Liaison Office: Maintaining National Security Hong Kong has only one country without two systems
(Central News Agency reporter Zhang Qian, Hong Kong, 15th) Beijing officials in Hong Kong today claimed that Hong Kong "has only one country's responsibility and no two systems" in safeguarding China's national security. He also criticized the "Occupy China" movement and the pan-democratic faction. Visiting the United States and other words and deeds.

Official Radio Television Hong Kong reported that Wang Zhimin, director of the Beijing Central Liaison Office in Hong Kong, delivered a speech at the National Security Education Day. Hong Kong's security is part of national security. Maintaining national security is a constitutional mission of "one country, two systems" and safeguarding national security. In one case, the SAR is not special. "There is only one country's responsibility, there is no distinction between the two systems."

According to reports, he also pointed out that "Zhongzhong" is an illegal movement packed in righteousness. It is a hypocrisy and insult to justice and a deep damage to the rule of law in Hong Kong."

He said that we must face up to and solve the shortcomings and risks of Hong Kong in safeguarding the national security system.

According to the report, Wang Zhimin claimed that this was "an important day for the rule of law in Hong Kong" for the local court's ruling last week.

According to reports, Wang Zhimin also criticized "a very small number of people in Hong Kong and anti-Chinese politicians sing Hong Kong and seek international intervention."

The former Chief Secretary for Administration, Mrs Anson Chan and the Citizens Party Legislative Council, visited the United States last month to reflect on the Hong Kong issue, including concerns about the Government's amendment of the fugitive offenders regulations.
